complete.cancelMessage: Credits will be refunded immediately upon cancellation.

terms.s1Content: GrowBook is a service that uses AI to create physical photo albums from your precious moments. You can create albums for various themes including child growth, pets, travel, and memories.
terms.s2Content: You must sign in with a Google account to use this service. Users must comply with applicable laws and these terms, and must not upload content that infringes on the rights of others.
terms.s3Content: Album orders are paid by deducting credits. The total amount including production and shipping fees will be deducted from your credits. If credits are insufficient, you can charge them at the partner portal.
terms.s4Content: Orders can only be cancelled when in Payment Complete (PAID) or Ready for Production (PDF_READY) status. Cancellation is not possible after production begins. Upon cancellation, deducted credits will be refunded immediately.
terms.s5Content: Personal information may be collected during service use. Please refer to the Privacy Policy for details.
terms.s6Content: The service provider is not responsible for the content of AI-generated stories and captions. Copyright of images and text uploaded by users belongs to the users, and the service provider is not liable for them. The service provider is not responsible for service interruptions caused by force majeure such as natural disasters or system failures.
terms.s7Content: In case of disputes related to these terms, both parties shall negotiate in good faith for an amicable resolution. If negotiation fails, either party may file a lawsuit with the competent court.
terms.effectiveDate: These terms are effective from April 1, 2025.

privacy.s1Intro: The following information is collected upon Google sign-in.
privacy.s1OrderIntro: Additional information is collected when placing an order.
privacy.s3Content: Personal information is destroyed immediately upon account deletion. However, information required by law will be retained for the legally mandated period. Records of contracts or withdrawal of subscription are kept for 5 years, and records of payment and supply of goods are kept for 5 years under the Electronic Commerce Act.
privacy.s4Intro: Information is shared with the following third party for album production and delivery.
privacy.s4ProviderItems: Shared items: Recipient name, phone number, address
privacy.s5Content: Electronic files are permanently deleted using irrecoverable methods. Printed personal information is destroyed by shredding or incineration.
privacy.s6Content: Users may view, modify, or delete their personal information at any time. Users may withdraw consent for personal information processing, which may result in limited service access. Please contact customer support for personal information inquiries.
privacy.effectiveDate: This policy is effective from April 1, 2025.
